data.title: As a developer, I have confidence the EAGAIN retry path works end-to-end
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Create an integration test that deliberately induces EAGAIN via ulimit -u and verifies the full retry → reclassification → non-blocking gate path
**Why**: The retry and reclassification logic spans multiple files (suite-engine, record-test-status, pre-commit-test-gate). An E2E test ensures the full path works together, not just each piece in isolation.
**Scope**:
- IN: Integration test using ulimit -u to constrain process count, verification of retry behavior, verification of resource_exhaustion status, verification of test gate non-blocking
- OUT: Unit tests for individual components (covered in their respective stories)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, an integration test deliberately induces EAGAIN via ulimit -u to constrain process count and verifies the full retry to reclassification to non-blocking gate path end-to-end
  ← Satisfies: "An integration test deliberately induces EAGAIN and verifies the full retry → reclassification → non-blocking gate path end-to-end"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] ulimit -u integration test may be fragile on systems with different process limit defaults — consider detecting available process headroom before constraining, and skipping gracefully if the system cannot be constrained enough to trigger EAGAIN
